assertions.title: Depth chart rendering

steps.action: Navigate to Orderbook view and inspect Depth Chart section
steps.expected: Stepped cumulative bid (green) and ask (red) depth areas are visible
steps.observed: Depth Chart panel is visible with a canvas, but UI shows "No depth data" and no rendered bid/ask areas

steps.expected: Depth endpoint provides non-empty bid/ask levels for chart rendering
steps.observed: In-browser fetch to http://localhost:3100/depth returned 200 with bids=[], asks=[]

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing runtime depth data; required green/red stepped depth areas cannot be validated in empty-state mode.

assertions.title: Trade ticker

steps.action: Inspect Recent Trades panel in Orderbook view
steps.expected: Scrolling trades list with colored price, quantity, and time entries
steps.observed: Panel renders headers and placeholder text "No trades yet" with no trade rows

steps.expected: Trades endpoint provides recent rows for ticker rendering
steps.observed: In-browser fetch to http://localhost:3100/trades returned 200 with an empty array

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing runtime trade data; ticker row color/time and new-trade animation cannot be validated without entries.

steps.action: Verify default Buy state in order form
steps.expected: Buy toggle active with green accent; price/amount/order-type controls visible
steps.observed: Buy state active; indicator background `rgb(16, 185, 129)` (green), and Price/Amount fields plus Limit/Market selector are visible

steps.expected: Sell toggle active with red accent and animated indicator shift
steps.observed: Sell state active; indicator moved and background changed to `rgb(244, 63, 94)` (red)

evidence.network: not required for this visual toggle assertion

steps.action: Set viewport to 1280x900 in Orderbook view
steps.expected: Orderbook, depth chart, order form, and trade ticker appear in desktop multi-panel layout with no horizontal scroll
steps.observed: All four sections visible concurrently; heading positions confirm two-column panel layout and overflow check returned false

evidence.network: layout-only assertion; no blocking network dependency observed

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` returned no captured entries in this session, so backend response evidence for depth/trades was collected via in-browser `fetch` checks instead.
frictions.resolution: Used `agent-browser eval` with `fetch(http://localhost:3100/depth|/trades)` and recorded status/payload counts.

blockers.description: Runtime market data was unavailable for visual data-driven panels: depth and trades both remained empty.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Reloaded page, waited, and directly fetched backend endpoints; both still returned empty datasets.

summary: Tested 4 assigned assertions: 2 passed (VAL-FRONTEND-011, VAL-FRONTEND-018) and 2 blocked by missing runtime depth/trade data (VAL-FRONTEND-009, VAL-FRONTEND-010).
